response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the reference lyrics for 'side by side', but some song sections were omitted in this live version. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used for the sung portions; discarded the unused album song lyrics. Manually transcribed the spoken bridge and closing remarks, translating the Japanese sections of speech accurately. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle transitions are tightly aligned with vocal onset and offset to avoid delays.

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: Thank you for always being here for us!
subtitles.english: Thank you for always being here for us!

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: Thank you for the encore, Ruffians!
subtitles.english: Thank you for the encore, Ruffians!

subtitles.original: That was side by side!
subtitles.english: That was side by side!

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: We're really happy to sing side by side for you for the first time live today!
subtitles.english: We're really happy to sing side by side for you for the first time live today!

subtitles.original: Yeah! 初披露できてとっても嬉しかったです！
subtitles.english: Yeah! We are so happy we got to perform it live for the first time!

subtitles.original: Yeah, side by side is a song made by Aiobahn-san,
subtitles.english: Yeah, side by side is a song made by Aiobahn-san,

subtitles.original: but also between FuwaMoco!
subtitles.english: but also between FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: Yeah, it is!
subtitles.english: Yeah, it is!

subtitles.original: We know it's a song that you love a lot,
subtitles.english: We know it's a song that you love a lot,

subtitles.original: but we also do because it's very special to us
subtitles.english: but we also do because it's very special to us

subtitles.original: since it's the ending theme for a visual novel that we care about...
subtitles.english: since it's the ending theme for a visual novel that we care about...

subtitles.original: Nekopara!
subtitles.english: Nekopara!

subtitles.original: Nekopara! Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Nekopara! Bau bau!

subtitles.original: And with this song, our dream of singing the opening or ending theme for a visual novel came true!
subtitles.english: And with this song, our dream of singing the opening or ending theme for a visual novel came true!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: そう、この曲で、Fuwamocoの夢、美少女ゲームの主題歌を歌うことが叶いました！
subtitles.english: That's right, with this song, FuwaMoco's dream of singing the theme song for a bishojo game has come true!

subtitles.original: It came true! Thank you! Thank you!
subtitles.english: It came true! Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: And thank you so much for joining us for a special day again this year.
subtitles.english: And thank you so much for joining us for a special day again this year.

subtitles.original: It's been a dream, Ruffians!
subtitles.english: It's been a dream, Ruffians!

subtitles.original: And we know it's all because of you that we're able to be here
subtitles.english: And we know it's all because of you that we're able to be here

subtitles.original: and do all the amazing things that we do, so thank you.
subtitles.english: and do all the amazing things that we do, so thank you.

subtitles.original: Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: It's sad to say, but...
